data.title: ASML Struggles In Wednesday Pre-Market As Nvidia, AMD And Other Peers Begin Recovery From Chipmaker's Downward Pull
data.description: ASML's CEO mentioned a gradual recovery and cautious customer sentiment, while CFO Roger Dassen projected China's contribution to ASML's revenue to normalize at 20% next year, down from 49% in the June quarter.

data.title: Stellantis Set To Build More Ram Trucks In Mexico, Potentially Escalating UAW Dispute: Report
data.description: In a move that could further strain its relationship with the United Auto Workers, Stellantis NV is planning to expand its production of Ram trucks in Mexico.

data.title: Elon Musk Applauds Spotify After Streaming Giant Reveals Its Audiobook Catalog Has Doubled To 300K Titles
data.description: Elon Musk expressed appreciation for Spotify's growth in the audiobook industry, as CEO Daniel Ek shared that the platform has doubled its catalog to 300,000 titles and expanded to new markets.

data.title: eBay's Circular Fashion Fund Expands To US And Germany, Fueling Eco-Friendly Fashion Revolution
data.description: EBAY expands Circular Fashion Fund to support start-ups with $1.2 million investment, open for applications until Nov 15, 2024.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Says 'Uptrend' Developing In Bitcoin's Market Structure Because Of This Reason
data.description: Asset management giant Ark Invest predicted a positive turn for Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) price on account of the oversold conditions witnessed for the Stablecoin Supply Ratio Oscillator (SSRO.)
